## Tender: 30437466-20251230-001

**Status:** complete
**Confidence:** 9/10
**Reviewer:** prime

### Summary
Transformed tickly-cough.md from academic PubMed style to accessible Wikipedia-level tone. All 21 citations preserved, all numerical data intact, scientific accuracy maintained. Applied all tone guidelines: converted statistical notation to plain language (MD/CI → practical effects), simplified medical terminology with inline definitions, replaced anatomical jargon with common names, spelled out acronyms, translated RCTs/preclinical to clinical trials/animal studies. Target 8th-grade reading level achieved while preserving rigor.
